profile.description: Multi-name universe. Cross-sectional rank signal on [-3, +3]; RankIC / adjusted IR vs equal-weight benchmark.

returns.note: active-weight: OW/UW each name around equal weight, tilted by the signal (active budget 0.5); per-run series show run-to-run drift, ensemble = averaged signal; benchmark = equal-weight universe. This is a variance visualization, not a portfolio backtest.

cost_adjusted_returns.note: Transaction costs modelled at 5.0 bps per trade (one-way). Turnover = sum(|Δw|) at each rebalance; cost = turnover × bps/10000. First rebalance entry cost not charged (cold-start assumption). Gross series = no costs; Net series = after costs. Benchmark = equal-weight universe, no costs.
